# Vendored MengTo/Skills Core Set

This folder contains selected skill files copied from:

https://github.com/MengTo/Skills

License: MIT. See `LICENSE-MengTo-Skills`.

## Why These Skills Are Included

The personal brand site agent is for beginner-friendly brand homepage creation. The full MengTo/Skills repository is broad, so this package vendors only the core skills that improve the lecture workflow:

- `stitched-full-page-capture`: reliable reference capture for real websites
- `html-to-interaction-prompts`: turn existing pages into reusable interaction prompts
- `design-first-ui-prompting`: turn vague taste into structured prompts
- `high-end-visual-design`: anti-generic premium visual rules
- `landing-page`: conversion structure for one audience and one action
- `animation-on-scroll`: lightweight IntersectionObserver scroll reveals
- `cinematic-scroll-storytelling`: premium scroll narrative vocabulary and GSAP/Lenis patterns
- `optimize-web-animations`: performance and reduced-motion guardrails

## Local Adaptation Rule

Use these files as source skills and guardrails. The student-facing agent should still translate them into beginner-friendly Korean instructions, static HTML/CSS/JS defaults, and the student's own brand context.
